changeSet.author: labsolution
changeSet.comment: Set the SD1-panel LOINC on existing chemistry Test rows (Glucose, Creatinine) where unset (LIS-86).

rollback.sql: UPDATE clinlims.test SET loinc = NULL WHERE name = 'Glucose' AND loinc = '2345-7'; UPDATE clinlims.test SET loinc = NULL WHERE name = 'Creatinine' AND loinc = '2160-0';

changeSet.author: labsolution
changeSet.comment: Insert any SD1-panel chemistry Test row whose LOINC is not yet present (AST/ALT/TP/BUN always; Glucose/Creatinine only on a clean, non-demo install). Section is reused from the Glucose row when available (LIS-86).
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.test (id, name, description, loinc, is_active, orderable, test_section_id, guid, lastupdated) SELECT nextval('clinlims.test_seq'), v.name, v.name, v.loinc, 'Y', true, (SELECT t2.test_section_id FROM clinlims.test t2 WHERE t2.name = 'Glucose' AND t2.test_section_id IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1), gen_random_uuid()::varchar, now() FROM (VALUES ('Glucose', '2345-7'), ('Blood Urea Nitrogen', '3094-0'), ('Creatinine', '2160-0'), ('Aspartate Aminotransferase', '1920-8'), ('Alanine Aminotransferase', '1742-6'), ('Total Protein', '2885-2') ) AS v(name, loinc) WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.test t WHERE t.loinc = v.loinc);

changeSet.author: labsolution

and.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.analyzer WHERE name = 'Seamaty SD1'

changeSet.comment: Seed the Seamaty SD1 analyzer (SETUP status, HL7 v2.3.1; transport configured by the operator at deploy) (LIS-86).
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.analyzer (id, name, description, is_active, status, protocol_version, last_updated) VALUES (nextval('clinlims.analyzer_seq'), 'Seamaty SD1', 'Seamaty SD1 dry-chem biochemistry analyzer', true, 'SETUP', 'HL7_V2_3_1', now());

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM clinlims.analyzer WHERE name = 'Seamaty SD1';

changeSet.author: labsolution

and.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.analyzer WHERE name = 'Seamaty SD1'

changeSet.comment: Map the 6 SD1 analyzer codes (OBX-3.1) to the OE Test carrying each LOINC, so attachTestCodeLoinc emits the code->LOINC pairs the bridge applies (LIS-86).
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.analyzer_test_map (analyzer_id, analyzer_test_name, test_id, last_updated) SELECT a.id, v.code, (SELECT min(t.id) FROM clinlims.test t WHERE t.loinc = v.loinc), now() FROM clinlims.analyzer a CROSS JOIN (VALUES ('GLU', '2345-7'), ('BUN', '3094-0'), ('CREA', '2160-0'), ('AST', '1920-8'), ('ALT', '1742-6'), ('TP', '2885-2') ) AS v(code, loinc) WHERE a.name = 'Seamaty SD1' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.test t WHERE t.loinc = v.loinc) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.analyzer_test_map m WHERE m.analyzer_id = a.id AND m.analyzer_test_name = v.code);
